---
description: "Generate comprehensive tests for selected code, covering happy paths, edge cases, and error scenarios"
agent: "agent"
tools: [read, edit, search, execute]
---

Write tests for the provided code:

1. Cover happy path, edge cases, and error scenarios
2. Use Vitest + React Testing Library
3. Follow patterns from existing test files in the project
4. Run `pnpm test` to verify tests pass
5. Aim for meaningful coverage, not 100% line coverage
